channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: 3 More Things I Learned from the SpaceX IPO Prospectus
item.description: Marvel has a Hulk. SpaceX has "the Algorithm."

item.title: SpaceX Just Lowered Its IPO Valuation Target by $200 Billion
item.description: The prospective valuation of Elon Musk's space and artificial intelligence (AI) company would need to fall by an additional $1.25 trillion to escape historical bubble territory.

item.title: SpaceX IPO could hit popular index funds — and your 401(k) — in as little as 5 trading days as indexes relax their rules
item.description: The fastest path doesn't run through the Nasdaq fund everyone's watching — analysts say a plain total-market fund in millions of retirement accounts could be positioned to buy within a week of the IPO. And SpaceX lost $4.9 billion last year. Here's what it means for the money you've already inves...

item.title: BYD will pay for crashes on its FSD competitor, something Tesla never has
item.description: BYD says it will assume full financial liability for at-fault accidents that happen while its “God’s Eye” urban driving system is active in China — with no cap on the payout. It’s a commitment Tesla has never made for “Full Self-Driving,” and it flips the industry’s standard liability model on it...

item.title: Could SpaceX IPO Be Bad News for Tesla Investors?
item.description: For years, Tesla dominated Elon Musk's growth narrative. But SpaceX may soon compete for investor attention, capital, and excitement.

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Open June On Strong Footing: Why NVDA, DELL, HPE, TSM, TSLA, SPCE, RVMD Are In Focus
item.description: Data from Stocktwits shows that retail sentiment has held at ‘bullish’ on SPY, but sits at a cautious ‘neutral’ on QQQ.

item.title: Tesla saves its passengers again – This time after a 300-foot cliff fall in Malibu
item.description: A Tesla Model 3 plunged roughly 300 feet off a cliff on Mulholland Highway in Malibu on Friday morning, May 29, 2026, and both occupants survived. The crash was reported at approximately 7:30 a.m. near the 2500 block of Mulholland Highway, triggering a multi-agency rescue operation involving Mali...

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips Overnight: SpaceX IPO Hype Is Starting To Look Like Amazon's Dot-Com Bubble Peak In 2000, Warns Ex-Lehman Trader
item.description: McDonald said a $2 trillion valuation for SpaceX leaves little room for Tesla-like returns.

item.title: Why a Tesla and SpaceX Merger Would Not Be Great News for Tesla Shareholders
item.description: The SpaceX initial public offering is exciting, but Tesla investors shouldn't welcome the idea of a future merger between the two companies.

item.title: Tesla Backs Off Threat to Cancel Australian Graphite Supply Agreement, Syrah Stock Pops Over 23%
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) on Monday backed away from terminating its supply deal with Australia’s Syrah Resources after the graphite producer demonstrated progress in meeting product qualification requirements. The EV maker accepted that the Syrah had produced conforming natural graphite active anode m...

item.title: Sorry for another Cybercab pic, but I saw one rigged with test equipment along with a Cybertruck and thought it was mildly interesting
item.description: submitted by /u/mientosiempre [link] [comments]

item.title: Dow Jones Futures, Oil Prices Rise As Trump Makes This Iran Move; Nvidia, Tesla Lead 5 Titans Near Buy Points
item.description: Crude oil prices rose Sunday as President Trump reportedly stiffened Iran deal terms. Nvidia, Tesla lead five titans near buy points.

item.title: SpaceX Buys 8% of Tesla’s Cybertrucks—and It Doesn’t Get a Discount
item.description: FEATURE You would think Tesla would give SpaceX a volume discount. That isn’t the case, though. It turns out, one of the biggest fans of Tesla’s Cybertruck is SpaceX.

item.title: Nio Just Launched a Budget EV to Take On Tesla and BYD. Is Nio Stock Finally Worth Buying?
item.description: Lower prices and better margins are changing the Nio story.

item.title: A SpaceX/Tesla merger could trigger Musk’s $1T pay package automatically
item.description: SpaceX has a big IPO coming up, but the next step might be a merger of SpaceX and Tesla. And if so, it could be a backdoor to triggering Elon Musk’s trillion-dollar pay package automatically, without having to meet any of the operational milestones, thus diluting everyone’s shares without deliver...

item.title: Elon Musk Says Economy Cannot Function Without Prices: Tesla And SpaceX CEO Shares Stinging Critique Of Socialist Central Planning
item.description: On Wednesday, Elon Musk showed his support for the years-old Austrian school of economics, associated with Ludwig von Mises, saying that prices are an important factor for an economy to function properly. In a post on X, Musk wrote, "Prices...

item.title: Tesla Rival Figure Lands Deal With JCPenney Parent After Viral Package Sorting Marathon, White House Visit
item.description: Humanoid robotics company Figure has had quite the few months of activity, with a viral appearance alongside First Lady Melania Trump at the White House and a viral package sorting marathon. The company, which is a rival to Tesla Inc...

item.title: Is Tesla Stock Your Ticket to Becoming a Millionaire?
item.description: The EV stock's historical return is jaw-dropping, supporting its current market cap of $1.4 trillion.

item.title: If Elon Musk merges SpaceX with Tesla he’ll create a $3.4 trillion behemoth—with zero profits
item.description: A SpaceX-Tesla union would mark by far the largest merger of all time.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Makes This Iran Move; Nvidia, Tesla Lead 5 Titans Near Buy Points
item.description: The stock market hit fresh highs on Iran deal hopes. Nvidia, Tesla lead five trillion-dollar titans near buy points.

item.title: This AI Chip Giant Quietly Became Worth More Than Tesla, and Many Investors Still Overlook It
item.description: The chipmaker quietly powering the AI boom has passed Tesla in market value, yet still flies under the radar.

item.title: Why 2026 Is a Year of Foundational Growth for Tesla
item.description: Tesla's trailing earnings in 2026 are likely to make the stock look overvalued on a superficial basis, but long-term bulls won't care.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Deal Or No, Market Hits Highs; Nvidia, Tesla Lead 5 Titans Near Buy Points
item.description: The stock market hit fresh highs on Iran deal hopes. Nvidia, Tesla lead five trillion-dollar titans near buy points.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving expansion in Europe continues with new addition
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving (Supervised) has taken yet another significant step forward in Europe. On May 29, Estonia became the third European Union country to approve the advanced driver-assistance technology, following approvals in the Netherlands and Lithuania. Tesla Europe announced the news on ...

item.title: Tesla’s ‘Full Self-Driving’ fraud lawsuit gets first hearing in China — 10 owners seek $583K
item.description: A Beijing court held its first hearing in a consumer fraud lawsuit against Tesla over its “Full Self-Driving” software, with 10 owners seeking more than 3.95 million yuan ($583,000) in damages. The case, which we first covered when it was filed last September , has grown from 7 to 10 plaintiffs a...

item.title: Tesla’s Next Act? Wall Street Begins Weighing a SpaceX Combination
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has staged an impressive recovery since reaching a multi-month low earlier this spring. The electric vehicle maker has climbed more than 30% since early April and is now trading near $440 a share, reclaiming levels that seemed distant only a few weeks ago.

item.title: Is SpaceX & Tesla 100-Gigawatt/Year US Solar System Production Plan Realistic?
item.description: Elon Musk says that he wants SpaceX and Tesla teams to work together to build 100 gigawatts of solar power manufacturing capacity in the US — cells and modules. And he wants to do that within three years. There’s a lot to consider here.

item.title: Meet This Pick-and-Shovel AI Stock That Just Joined Meta, Tesla, and Broadcom as the Newest Member of the $1 Trillion Club
item.description: More and more artificial intelligence companies are surpassing $1 trillion market caps, as investors get more bullish on the sector.

item.title: Tesla Could Build A Model 3 Plaid. That Doesn’t Mean It Will
item.description: Tesla’s top engineer says he thinks about a tri-motor Model 3 “all the time,” but the company’s priorities lie elsewhere.

item.title: This Is SpaceX's Biggest Market, and It Might Surprise You (Spoiler Alert: It Has Nothing to Do With Space)
item.description: If you're interested in SpaceX, make sure to understand what it really does and what it plans to do.

item.title: Danish Pension Blacklists SpaceX Over ‘Catastrophic Governance’
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- A $25 billion Danish pension fund that earlier this year made headlines by ditching Treasuries as Donald Trump was threatening to seize Greenland now says it won’t touch SpaceX.Most Read from BloombergSingapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail TermStrait of Hormuz Ship Tran...

item.title: Turns Out, Tesla’s Best Cybertruck Customer Is SpaceX
item.description: FEATURE You would think Tesla would give SpaceX a volume discount. That isn’t the case, though. It turns out, one of the biggest fans of Tesla’s Cybertruck is SpaceX.

item.title: Tesla Investors Weigh SpaceX Merger Talk Governance Shifts And AI Impact
item.description: Growing commentary from early SpaceX investor Peter Diamandis and other industry observers is fueling talk of a potential merger between Tesla and SpaceX. Speculation centers on a future scenario where a SpaceX IPO could be followed by consolidation of the two companies, with Elon Musk seeking ti...

item.title: This Tesla owner won a $10k refund in court for Tesla’s FSD lies (Updated)
item.description: For over a decade now, Tesla has sold a promise of vehicles that can drive themselves, even stating that every car it produced had all the hardware for self-driving . But after years of the company being unable to deliver, some owners want their money back. Ben Gawiser is one of those owners, who...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Declines While Market Improves: Some Information for Investors
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) reached $435.79 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a -1.43% change compared to its last close.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Hits Highs On Iran Hopes; Nvidia, Tesla Lead 5 Trillion-Dollar Stocks Near Buy Points
item.description: The stock market hit fresh highs on Iran deal hopes. Nvidia, Tesla lead five trillion-dollar titans near buy points.

item.title: Waymo Unveils Ojai Robotaxi As Driverless Race Heats Up
item.description: Alphabet's Waymo will offer unsupervised public rides in California and Arizona with its purpose-built Ojai vehicle.

item.title: Tesla & SpaceX Merger Getting Real
item.description: Steve Hanley had an excellent article this week discussing how the SpaceX IPO may well be a boondoggle to bail out a couple of Elon Musk ventures and enrich a few friends. It’s honestly a bit shocking once you get into the details of the IPO. I think most of ...

item.title: Elon Musk strikes down reports on SpaceX IPO rumors
item.description: Elon Musk has firmly denied recent media reports suggesting that SpaceX has reduced its target valuation for an upcoming initial public offering. The denial came directly from the SpaceX and Tesla frontman on his social media platform X, where he responded with a single word, “False,” to a post f...

item.title: Podcast: Tesla Robotaxi numbers, Ferrari’s controversial Luce launches, Waymo Ojai, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla’s alarming Robotaxi numbers, Ferrari’s controversial Luce, Waymo Ojai, and more. Today’s episode is sponsored by GM Energy .

item.title: Rivian Rallies 8% as Tesla, Nio Stall: R2 Launch and Software Growth in Focus
item.description: Rivian Automotive (NASDAQ:RIVN) is leading the electric vehicle complex into Friday afternoon. The stock is up 8% to $16.42 as of midday trading, after closing Thursday at $15.20. The pop comes on a session that has seen peers stall.

item.title: The 180-Day Lease Holding Up SpaceX's $2 Trillion IPO
item.description: SpaceX's reported $2 trillion valuation is being propped up by a 180-day lease to Anthropic.

item.title: Tesla’s Robotaxi dreams just took a massive step toward reality
item.description: Tesla’s dreams of operating a fully autonomous ride-hailing platform just took a massive step toward reality, as two separate events have indicated the company is perhaps closer than ever to achieving self-driving as a product. On Thursday, Tesla was granted authorization by the State of Texas to...

item.title: Tesla Prepares To Use Cybercabs As Robotaxis. Here's How Big Its Fleet Is.
item.description: New filings show in Texas show the number of fully self-driving cars that are in Tesla's robotaxi fleet. A top executive at Tesla teased that Cybercabs would soon join the company's fleet of robotaxis.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Fleet Trails Waymo in Texas
item.description: State data shows Tesla has 42 authorized robotaxis in Texas, far below Waymo's fleet size.

item.title: Tesla Stock Fans Just Got Worrying News From Texas
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi Fleet Crushed by Waymo in Texas as New Records Reveal Huge Gap

item.title: How Safe Is a Tesla Robo-Taxi?
item.description: Tesla stock is trying for seven consecutive gains on Friday, as investors look for progress on its artificial intelligence applications, including robo-taxis and robots. There is reason for some optimism on the AI front, according to a recent report from Morgan Stanley. Tesla uses AI to train it...

item.title: Here’s Why Tesla (TSLA) Fell Sharply in Q1
item.description: Impax Asset Management, an investment management firm based in London, specializing in sustainable investing, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for its “Impax US Sustainable Economy Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The US Sustainable Economy portfolio under...

item.title: Tesla Issues Service Bulletins for Model Y Suspension Creaks - Not a Tesla App
item.description: submitted by /u/compx2 [link] [comments]

item.title: Why a merger with SpaceX could be bad for Tesla shareholders
item.description: Elon Musk is musing about a merger between SpaceX and Tesla. For shareholders of the EV maker, however, it might not be a good thing.
